properties.title: Request Count (Counter)
properties.query:
SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /request_count/
| stats sum(request_count) by bin(1m)

properties.title: Active Connections (UpDownCounter)
properties.query:
SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /active_connections/
| stats avg(active_connections) by bin(1m)

SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /request_duration_ms/
| stats

  sum(`request_duration_ms.Count`) as count,

  sum(`request_duration_ms.Sum`) as sum,

  sum(`request_duration_ms.Max`) as max,

  sum(`request_duration_ms.Min`) as min,

  sum(`request_duration_ms.Sum`) / sum(`request_duration_ms.Count`) as
avg_latency

  by bin(1m)
properties.title: Request Duration (Histogram)

properties.query:
SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /memory_usage_mb/
| stats avg(memory_usage_mb), max(memory_usage_mb), memory_usage_mb by bin(1m)
properties.title: Memory Usage (Gauge)
All Metrics Summary
properties.query:
SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /_aws/ or @message like /Metric/
| display @timestamp, @message
| limit 20

properties.title: HTTP Server Active Requests
properties.query:
SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /http.server.active_requests/
| stats avg(http.server.active_requests) by bin(1m)

SOURCE "/aws/ecs/application/metrics" |
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @message like /http.server.request.duration/
| stats
  sum(`http.server.request.duration.Count`) as count, 
  sum(`http.server.request.duration.Sum`) as sum, 
  sum(`http.server.request.duration.Max`) as max, 
  sum(`http.server.request.duration.Min`) as min, 
  sum(`http.server.request.duration.Sum`) / sum(`http.server.request.duration.Count`) as avg_latency
  by bin(1m)
properties.title: HTTP Server Request Duration
